[2018-04-07 17:12] jonesy4979 (Jonesy): Could anyone here explain the ticket system in this game?
[2018-04-07 17:17] iminabearsuit: To play ranked, you pick one of three tickets to play on. And for each game you win, you add some medals in order to complete the ticket. And once you've completed a ticket, you gain your play rewards. Kind of similar to how Hearthstone Arena works, except it counts how many wins you have - instead of losses.
[2018-04-07 17:18] iminabearsuit: The different tiers of tickets, increase the bonuses you get at the end, when the ticket is finished.
[2018-04-07 17:22] jonesy4979 (Jonesy): @iminaBearSuit How do you acquire the different tickets
[2018-04-07 17:23] iminabearsuit: You can buy them for a small amount of shards, or they can drop from completed tickets.

messages.content: Could anyone here explain the ticket system in this game?

messages.content: To play ranked, you pick one of three tickets to play on. And for each game you win, you add some medals in order to complete the ticket. And once you've completed a ticket, you gain your play rewards. Kind of similar to how Hearthstone Arena works, except it counts how many wins you have - instead of losses.

messages.author: iminabearsuit
messages.content: The different tiers of tickets, increase the bonuses you get at the end, when the ticket is finished.
